code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test28-NOV-2018Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and significant proteinuria, indicating possible glomerular pathology. Urine is abnormal in appearance and color, with low specific gravity, mild glycosuria, and ketonuria, but no evidence of infection. Low total CO₂ may suggest mild metabolic acidosis. HbA1c is low, possibly due to anemia or recent changes in glucose metabolism. Recommend further renal evaluation and clinical correlation for underlying causes.
